argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast,hashlib,json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI"); drop=root/r"AGENT_FOX_V1A3C5"; installed=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks=[(drop/r"desktop_recovery_helper_dependency_closure_v1.py",installed/r"desktop_recovery_helper_dependency_closure_v1.py","44a4838ef7424b9758504e1be3ced0613e22d64b7ceb713809fe979940c36aea"),(drop/r"DESKTOP_RECOVERY_HELPER_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json",installed/r"DESKTOP_RECOVERY_HELPER_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json","9049a3212643bab0750bddc81e5a9d0167691d52fdda712fa7a4ff4a8d7f11ac"),(drop/r"README_V1A3C5.md",installed/r"README_V1A3C5.md","34230665b400176c7178d734e349612ced420e30039d9282dd30c429b9f40fa1")]
for s,t,h in checks:
 assert s.is_file() and t.is_file(); assert hashlib.sha256(s.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==h; assert hashlib.sha256(t.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==h
text=(installed/r"desktop_recovery_helper_dependency_closure_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8"); compile(text,str(installed/r"desktop_recovery_helper_dependency_closure_v1.py"),"exec")
tree=ast.parse(text); imports=set()
for n in ast.walk(tree):
 if isinstance(n,ast.Import): imports.update(a.name.split('.')[0] for a in n.names)
 elif isinstance(n,ast.ImportFrom) and n.module: imports.add(n.module.split('.')[0])
assert not (imports & {"subprocess","socket","urllib","http","ftplib","requests","pip","ensurepip","psutil","winreg","ctypes","webbrowser","importlib"})
c=json.loads((installed/r"DESKTOP_RECOVERY_HELPER_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); assert c["mission_id"]=="ENG-20260721-233008-E93FBD"; assert c["target"]["context_id"]=="CTX-FCE6D44FA8CBAF96"; assert c["pending_context"]["built"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C5_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")

import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-233008-E93FBD_V1A3C5_DESKTOP_RECOVERY_HELPER_CLOSURE")

ctx=c["context"]; assert ctx["context_id"]=="CTX-FCE6D44FA8CBAF96" and ctx["path_group_id"]=="PATHGROUP-26C1A7D4F9C70C86" and ctx["line"]==43; assert ctx["arguments"]==["--root",r"Z:\FOXAI","--source","desktop"]
assert c["linked_completed_same_entry_script_context"]["baseline_mission_id"]=="ENG-20260721-222209-FFD6EF"; assert c["pending_desktop_recovery_gui_context"]["context_id"]=="CTX-5A02B9D4A8E26D64" and c["pending_desktop_recovery_gui_context"]["built_by_this_mission"] is False
assert cov["preliminary_reached_source_count"]==1 and cov["preliminary_dependency_edge_count"]==0 and cov["preliminary_unresolved_branch_count"]==1
assert any(x.get("module")=="psutil" and x.get("line")==38 for x in u["records"]); assert r["internal_deterministic_rebuild_match"] is True
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C5_EXACT_CONTEXT_VERIFIED")
